parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 800, tools: [{ type: 'web_search_20250305', name: 'web_search' }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Search for today\'s pre-market data for Indian stock markets. Find: 1) SGX Nifty / GIFT Nifty current level and change, 2) US markets close (Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq), 3) Asian markets today (Nikkei, Hang Seng, Shanghai), 4) Crude oil (Brent) price, 5) Gold price, 6) USD/INR rate. Return ONLY a JSON object: { "sgx_nifty": { "level": number, "change_pct": number }, "us_markets": { "dow": { "close": number, "change_pct": number }, "sp500": { "close": number, "change_pct": number }, "nasdaq": { "close": number, "change_pct": number } }, "asian_markets": { "nikkei": { "level": number, "change_pct": number }, "hang_seng": { "level": number, "change_pct": number } }, "commodities": { "brent_crude": number, "gold": number }, "usd_inr": number, "global_sentiment": "bullish|bearish|neutral", "key_events": ["event1", "event2"] }' }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO staging_data (data_date, data_type, data) VALUES ($1, 'global_cues', $2) ON CONFLICT (data_date, data_type, symbol) DO UPDATE SET data = $2, updated_at = NOW()
